data.title: Strong Authentication Methods
data.description: Implements multi-factor authentication for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Integration of OTP and biometric verification for enhanced security.

data.title: Encryption in Transit
data.description: Encrypts data as it moves between client devices and servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS/SSL protocols to secure communication channels.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Employs machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.
data.technical_spec: Behavior analytics to identify and mitigate security threats.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing and code reviews are standard practices.

data.title: Data Privacy Compliance
data.description: Adheres to data privacy regulations like GDPR and CCPA.
data.technical_spec: Data handling protocols ensure user data is protected.
